reviews.school_name: Dr. K K Rs Gowtham Concept School - Moula Ali
reviews.author: Prabhas Anwar
reviews.review_body:
I will suggest this school for students bcoz it is the best school for enjoying.., i don't know weather ur child will become an IIT'n or not but i can say that he will become a good actor..,his behavior will be loved by youth but not by parents..,and coming to incharg's they are the reasons for all.., a school with two boards of education ssc and cbse there may be no gender bias but there is a partiality between ssc and cbse.., only for name it is co-edicuation but it is like a separate girls school and boys school kept in one campus.., and coming to hostel it is the best way to make ur child worst.., finally.. i have enjoyed a lot in this school by making thinks against school rules.. I made many memories in this school but not marks..i got to know how to lead life but i didnt get to know how to study..
🌷Thank u...KKR🌷

reviews.school_name: Dr. K K Rs Gowtham Concept School - Moula Ali
reviews.author: Venkateswararao Inala
reviews.review_body: Don't think that this is a good school. Than this school government schools are better. IIT syllabus teaching is also not good. And I will rate schools maintenance 2/10. Don't let your child join this school or he will become soo stressed. I am not a hater of this school, I am a student of this school. Thank You
